summary: Applied Docker build count and duration telemetry live for docker-build-lv3 and verified the metrics in InfluxDB and Grafana.

verification.observed: docker_builds measurements included count, duration_ms, start_time_ns, and end_time_ns for docker-build-lv3.
The build VM detail dashboard showed build counts and duration panels after convergence.
A real smoke build on the build guest produced a successful telemetry row with duration data.
